description: Letter in Arabic script. Almost nothing of the letter itself is preserved, but most of the address is preserved: to be delivered to (New) Cairo, to Bāb al-Zuhūma, to the amīr Shujāʿ al-Dīn, to the Bābā (the Coptic Patriarch), to the house of the amīr [...], to Abū Bakr.
description_he: מכתב בערבית לקהיר. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
